CREATE TABLE "Accounts" (
    "Type" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "Username" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "PasswordHash" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "RandomSalt" TEXT NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Accounts" PRIMARY KEY ("Type", "Username")
)

CREATE TABLE "ArrDownloadCorrelations" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ArrDownloadCorrelations" PRIMARY KEY,
    "QueueItemId" TEXT NULL,
    "HistoryItemId" TEXT NULL,
    "ArrApp" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "InstanceKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "InstanceHost" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "DownloadId" TEXT NULL,
    "QueueRecordId" INTEGER NULL,
    "MediaKey" TEXT NULL,
    "MovieId" INTEGER NULL,
    "SeriesId" INTEGER NULL,
    "EpisodeId" INTEGER NULL,
    "SeasonNumber" INTEGER NULL,
    "ArtistId" INTEGER NULL,
    "AlbumId" INTEGER NULL,
    "EpisodeIdsJson" TEXT NULL,
    "ReleaseTitle" TEXT NULL,
    "Category" TEXT NULL,
    "Indexer" TEXT NULL,
    "DownloadClient" TEXT NULL,
    "Quality" TEXT NULL,
    "CustomFormatsJson" TEXT NULL,
    "Status" TEXT NULL,
    "TrackedDownloadStatus" TEXT NULL,
    "TrackedDownloadState" TEXT NULL,
    "IsUpgrade" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "IsDuplicate" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "CreatedAt" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedAt" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "LastSeenAt" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "Source" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'auto', "ManualLock" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

CREATE TABLE "ArrDownloadLifecycleEvents" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ArrDownloadLifecycleEvents" PRIMARY KEY,
    "QueueItemId" TEXT NULL,
    "HistoryItemId" TEXT NULL,
    "ArrApp" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "InstanceKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "DownloadId" TEXT NULL,
    "MediaKey" TEXT NULL,
    "State" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "StateReason" TEXT NULL,
    "CreatedAt" INTEGER NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE "ArrImportCommands" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ArrImportCommands" PRIMARY KEY,
    "HistoryItemId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "Category" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "RequiredInvalidationPathsJson" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "Status" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "Attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "CreatedAt" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedAt" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "NextAttemptAt" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "LastAttemptAt" INTEGER NULL,
    "LeaseExpiresAt" INTEGER NULL,
    "LeaseToken" TEXT NULL,
    "VisibleAt" INTEGER NULL,
    "CompletedAt" INTEGER NULL,
    "ResultsJson" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "LastError" TEXT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_ArrImportCommands_HistoryItems_HistoryItemId" FOREIGN KEY ("HistoryItemId") REFERENCES "HistoryItems" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE
)

CREATE TABLE "ArrSearchNudgeCommands" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ArrSearchNudgeCommands" PRIMARY KEY,
    "ArrApp" TEXT NOT NULL,

)

CREATE TABLE "ConfigItems" (
    "ConfigName" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_ConfigItems" PRIMARY KEY,
    "ConfigValue" TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE "DavItems" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_DavItems" PRIMARY KEY,
    "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE "DavMultipartFiles" (

CREATE TABLE "DavRarFiles" (

    CONSTRAINT "FK_DavRarFiles_DavItems_Id" FOREIGN KEY ("Id") REFERENCES "DavItems" ("Id") ON DELETE CASCADE

CREATE TABLE "HealthCheckResults" (

CREATE TABLE "NzbNames" (

CREATE TABLE "QueueItems" (
    "Id" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "PK_QueueItems" PRIMARY KEY,

CREATE TABLE "QueuePriorityHints" (

CREATE TABLE "RepairEntryHealth" (

CREATE TABLE "WorkerJobs" (

, "CancelRequestedAt" INTEGER NULL, "FailureKind" INTEGER NULL, "LastHeartbeatAt" INTEGER NULL, "LeaseGeneration" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "LeaseToken" TEXT NULL, "ProgressJson" TEXT NULL, "ProgressUpdatedAt" INTEGER NULL, "ResultJson" TEXT NULL, "StartedAt" INTEGER NULL)

CREATE TRIGGER TR_DavItems_DeleteDirectory
AFTER DELETE ON DavItems
WHEN OLD.SubType = 101
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO DavCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.Id);
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_DavItems_Delete_AddBlobCleanup
AFTER DELETE ON DavItems
WHEN OLD.FileBlobId IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO BlobCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.FileBlobId);
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_DavItems_Delete_AddNzbBlobCleanup
AFTER DELETE ON DavItems
WHEN OLD.NzbBlobId IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO NzbBlobCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.NzbBlobId);
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_DavItems_Update_AddBlobCleanup
AFTER UPDATE OF FileBlobId ON DavItems
WHEN OLD.FileBlobId IS NOT NULL AND OLD.FileBlobId != NEW.FileBlobId
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO BlobCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.FileBlobId);
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_HealthCheckResults_DecrementStats
AFTER DELETE ON HealthCheckResults
BEGIN
    UPDATE HealthCheckStats
    SET Count = Count - 1
    WHERE DateStartInclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND DateEndExclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND Result = OLD.Result
      AND RepairStatus = OLD.RepairStatus;

    DELETE FROM HealthCheckStats
    WHERE DateStartInclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND DateEndExclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND Result = OLD.Result
      AND RepairStatus = OLD.RepairStatus
      AND Count <= 0;
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_HealthCheckResults_IncrementStats
AFTER INSERT ON HealthCheckResults
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO HealthCheckStats (DateStartInclusive, DateEndExclusive, Result, RepairStatus, Count)
    VALUES (
        CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(NEW.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER),
        CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(NEW.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER),
        NEW.Result,
        NEW.RepairStatus,
        1
    )
    ON CONFLICT(DateStartInclusive, DateEndExclusive, Result, RepairStatus) DO UPDATE SET
        Count = Count + 1;
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_HealthCheckResults_UpdateStats
AFTER UPDATE ON HealthCheckResults
WHEN OLD.Result != NEW.Result OR OLD.RepairStatus != NEW.RepairStatus
BEGIN
    UPDATE HealthCheckStats
    SET Count = Count - 1
    WHERE DateStartInclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND DateEndExclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND Result = OLD.Result
      AND RepairStatus = OLD.RepairStatus;

    DELETE FROM HealthCheckStats
    WHERE DateStartInclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND DateEndExclusive = CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(OLD.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER)
      AND Result = OLD.Result
      AND RepairStatus = OLD.RepairStatus
      AND Count <= 0;

    INSERT INTO HealthCheckStats (DateStartInclusive, DateEndExclusive, Result, RepairStatus, Count)
    VALUES (
        CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(NEW.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch')) || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER),
        CAST(strftime('%s', date(datetime(NEW.CreatedAt, 'unixepoch'), '+1 day') || ' 00:00:00') AS INTEGER),
        NEW.Result,
        NEW.RepairStatus,
        1
    )
    ON CONFLICT(DateStartInclusive, DateEndExclusive, Result, RepairStatus) DO UPDATE SET
        Count = Count + 1;
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_HistoryItems_Delete_AddNzbBlobCleanup
AFTER DELETE ON HistoryItems
WHEN OLD.NzbBlobId IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO NzbBlobCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.NzbBlobId);
END

CREATE TRIGGER TR_QueueItems_AddNzbBlobCleanup
AFTER DELETE ON QueueItems
BEGIN
    INSERT OR IGNORE INTO NzbBlobCleanupItems (Id)
    VALUES (OLD.Id);
END
